data.body:
## S1 implemented + applied LIVE (account 896586841071, us-east-1) — 2026-06-30

Code authored at commit 30c92d4f4 on branch worktree-epic-d251; applied live.

**Live resources (terraform-managed, remote state in s3://rebar-tfstate-896586841071):**
- EC2 instance `i-00880b2c7f13527c5` — t4g.large, arm64, **State=running**, **IMDSv2 HttpTokens=required**.
- EBS data volume `vol-06fa2e77a9dd97527` (gp3, 50 GB, `prevent_destroy`); root gp3 30 GB.
- Elastic IP `52.3.128.230` (`prevent_destroy`); SG `sg-01c907b55cf3c2408` ingress = 443 + 29418 only (no 22).
- Route53 A `rebar.solutions.navateam.com` -> 52.3.128.230 (zone Z05558453EZPQLHKC20IQ); `dig` resolves.
- DLM policy `policy-0b9639e8c34abcbe9` State=**ENABLED**, retain_rule count=7, DLM service role `rebar-dlm-lifecycle-role` (trust dlm.amazonaws.com).
- Instance role `rebar-gerrit-instance-role`: SSM core + SSM read scoped to `parameter/rebar/prod/*` (no wildcard) + kms:Decrypt via `kms:ViaService=ssm.us-east-1.amazonaws.com` + CloudWatch basic.
- 7 SSM SecureString params under `/rebar/prod/*` created (placeholder CHANGEME) and populated with real values.

**In-box verification (via SSM Session Manager send-command):**
- cloud-init status = **done**.
- `/var/gerrit` mounted from **/dev/nvme1n1** (xfs) — NVMe-by-volume-id resolution worked on Nitro/Graviton; fstab entry by UUID (persists reboot).
- `/etc/rebar/.env` = **0600 root:root**, all 7 secrets present; CHANGEME fail-fast guard exercised (params were populated first, so boot succeeded).

**AC verification:**
- AC1 t4g.large + EIP + gp3 root/data@/var/gerrit + IMDSv2 — verified live.
- AC2 bootstrap one-time local-state; main backend `use_lockfile=true`, no DynamoDB, required_version>=1.10 — applied via S3 backend.
- AC3 prevent_destroy on data vol + EIP + state bucket — set; instance update-in-place (provider v5) confirmed the volume is not recreated.
- AC4 DNS + SG + SSM admin (no 22) — verified.
- AC5 user_data SSM->.env 0600, no plaintext secrets, CHANGEME fail-fast — verified.
- AC6 idempotent blkid-before-mkfs + dynamic NVMe device resolution by volume id — verified (mounted /dev/nvme1n1, no reformat).
- AC7 DLM daily retain=7 + service role ENABLED — verified.
- AC8 IAM SSM/KMS scoped to /rebar/prod/* — verified.
- AC9 ignore_changes=[ami] — set.
- AC10 7 SSM params enumerated by exact name — created.
- AC11 ADR-0012 records four decisions — committed.
- AC12 sdist+wheel exclude infra/ — `python -m build` then grep: 0 infra/ entries in both.

**Code review (subagent):** 1 blocker (missing infra/.gitignore for tfstate/provider binaries) — FIXED (state ignored, lock files tracked, verified `git add -n` stages no state). Comment nit in user_data.sh fixed. Final terraform fmt -check + validate clean; no pending plan diff.
